productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Crystal Cat Grey Scarf
description: This heavy duty chunky knit scarf in soft and insulating 100% acrylic yarn comes in a dark grey colour with a slight sheen that gives it a luxurious look. The slightly fluffy yarn offers exemplary warmth, making it a perfect addition to your winter wardrobe. Team it with a formal jacket or to smarten up a casual coat, while the small black and white puma logo is stitched onto one end. Length: 180cm Width: 24cm Washcare Hand wash with like colours Do not bleach Iron low Do not tumble dry
